name: Starlight Double-Delight Cake (1951)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans.
3. In a large bowl, combine cream cheese, butter, vanilla extract, and peppermint extract; blend until smooth. Gradually add powdered sugar and hot water, beating until smooth. Blend in melted chocolate.
4. In another large bowl, combine 2 cups of the frosting mixture and 1/4 cup butter; beat well. Beat in eggs one at a time, ensuring thorough incorporation after each addition.
5. Sift flour into a measuring cup and level off. Add flour, baking soda, salt, and milk to the bowl with the frosting mixture; beat until smooth. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
6. Bake for 30 to 40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Allow cooling for 5 minutes before removing from pans. Cool completely on wire racks.
7. To assemble cake, place one layer with the top side down on a serving plate and spread frosting over it. Top with second layer with the top side up and spread remaining frosting over sides and top of cake. Store in refrigerator.
